initial_candidates.sql:
WITH over_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bb.match_id,
        bb.innings_no,
        bb.over_id,
        bb.bowler,
        COALESCE(SUM(bs.runs_scored), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(er.extra_runs), 0) AS total_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    LEFT JOIN batsman_scored bs 
        ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
        AND bb.ball_id = bs.ball_id
    LEFT JOIN extra_runs er 
        ON bb.match_id = er.match_id 
        AND bb.over_id = er.over_id 
        AND bb.innings_no = er.innings_no
        AND bb.ball_id = er.ball_id
    GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.innings_no, bb.over_id, bb.bowler
),
highest_over_per_match AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        innings_no,
        over_id,
        bowler,
        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id, innings_no ORDER BY total_runs DESC) AS rn
    FROM over_runs
),
top_over_per_match AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        innings_no,
        over_id,
        bowler,
        total_runs
    FROM highest_over_per_match
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    AVG(total_runs) AS avg_highest_over_runs
FROM top_over_per_match;

WITH over_runs AS (
  SELECT
    bb.match_id,
    bb.over_id,
    bb.innings_no,
    bb.bowler,
    COALESCE(SUM(bs.runs_scored), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(er.extra_runs), 0) AS total_runs
  FROM ball_by_ball bb
  LEFT JOIN batsman_scored bs
    ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id
    AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id
    AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
  LEFT JOIN extra_runs er
    ON bb.match_id = er.match_id
    AND bb.over_id = er.over_id
    AND bb.innings_no = er.innings_no
  GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.over_id, bb.innings_no, bb.bowler
),
highest_over_per_match AS (
  SELECT
    match_id,
    over_id,
    innings_no,
    bowler,
    total_runs,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY total_runs DESC) AS rn
  FROM over_runs
)
SELECT
  AVG(total_runs) AS avg_highest_over_runs
FROM highest_over_per_match
WHERE rn = 1;

        total_runs,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY total_runs DESC) AS rn

)

    AVG(total_runs) AS avg_highest_over_runs
FROM highest_over_per_match
WHERE rn = 1;
